title: Lakeflow Designer will soon be available by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled
body:
Lakeflow Designer will be available by default for workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security-profile) enabled in late July 2026.

Lakeflow Designer is a visual, no-code experience for preparing and transforming data on a drag-and-drop canvas, with all workflows backed by production-ready code governed by Unity Catalog.

See [Lakeflow Designer](/aws/en/designer).
